title: Add friction summary next-grip proposal
goal: Summarize repeated Grabowski friction records into proposal-only recommendations for the next grip or small Bureau task to improve.

acceptance.assertion: Summary groups repeated command chains, blocked gates, stale snapshot incidents, review loops and missing receipt fields.
Summary may recommend a next grip or task but never executes it and never mutates Bureau queue state.
Each recommendation links back to source friction records or receipts and states what the evidence does not prove.
Focused tests cover repeated patterns, insufficient evidence, and no-action output.

metadata.non_goal: Does not auto-create Bureau tasks or change priority without a separate registration step.
metadata.verification_note: Grabowski PR #114 merged and added proposal-only next_grip_proposals to grabowski_friction_summary. The merged implementation groups repeated friction, uses unresolved bounded evidence IDs for recommendations, exposes non-claims and matched/unmatched counts, and never mutates Bureau or executes grips.

validated_acceptance.groups-repeated-friction: PR #114 groups command chains, blocked gates, stale snapshots, review loops and missing receipt fields.
validated_acceptance.proposal-only: PR #114 exposes authority=proposal_only and does not mutate Bureau queue state or execute grips.
validated_acceptance.evidence-linked: PR #114 links recommendations to bounded unresolved event IDs and exposes does_not_establish at top level.
validated_acceptance.tests: PR #114 added focused tests for repeated patterns, insufficient evidence, no-action output, unresolved evidence, broad terms, multi-pattern events, missing event IDs and empty input.

validation.local: make validate passed with 658 tests before merge
